/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/GameOfLife.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GameOfLife.dir/src/application.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GameOfLife.dir/src/grid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GameOfLife.dir/src/renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GameOfLife.dir/src/simulation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GameOfLife.dir/src/counter.cpp.o -o GameOfLife  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2.so
